title: The OLB Group reports FY results
content:
* The OLB Group press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20459039-the-olb-group-reports-fiscal-year-2025-results-highlighting-significant-cost-reductions] (OLB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OLB]): FY net loss improved by $5.4 million, narrowing from $11.2 million in 2024 to $5.9 million in 2025 - a 48% year-over-year improvement.
